slogan: Save. Develop your business. Live better.
headline: Membership, partner discovery, and Business Introduction in one club workspace.
subline: KYLYVNYK CLUB gives members a digital card, a verified business directory, and a structured way to request introductions through the club team.
statsSubtitle: Members, countries, and verified partners connected through one private club workspace.
topPartnersSubtitle: Curated club collaborations with verified business partners and member-only conditions.
topPartnerOneDescription: Private legal support for cross-border founders, family offices, and business owners working across European jurisdictions.
topPartnerTwoCondition: Private club conditions for active members.
topPartnerTwoDescription: Premium vehicle sourcing, concierge handover, and corporate fleet assistance for verified club residents.
topPartnerThreeDescription: Product design, secure web platforms, and technical delivery support for companies expanding their digital presence.
howSubtitle: Join the club, activate your digital membership card, and discover verified business partners across countries, cities, and categories.
stepOneText: Create your account and complete a quick club onboarding flow to unlock member access.
stepTwoText: Get your digital membership card in the dashboard and share verified status when needed.
stepThreeText: Browse the verified directory, filter by location and category, and request Business Introductions through the club team.
searchSubtitle: Filter verified businesses by country, city, and category to discover member-only conditions and club collaborations.
recommendedSubtitle: Hand-picked partners with member-friendly conditions across key categories and locations.
heroSubtitleHighlight: A private society for active and influential people building connections across countries and industries.
tierMemberDesc: Basic access to verified directory and standard offers.
tierVipDesc: Priority networking, exclusive B2B introductions, and private offers.
tierPartnerDesc: Directory visibility, corporate listing, and advertising options.
